audit_result.proof_trace: The function assumes cell_proofs contains exactly blobs.len * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB elements but performs no validation. Line 328 performs unchecked indexed access cell_proofs[i * CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB + j]. None of the three callers (RPC handler, EL response processor, validator path) validate proof array size before calling.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Attacker submits block via RPC with N blobs but fewer than N*CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB proofs. When assemble_data_column_sidecars executes line 328, out-of-bounds access triggers IndexDefect panic, crashing the node (DoS).

PROP-57888860-inv-027.text: Each blob must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB cell-proof pairs in cells_and_kzg_proofs construction.
